args.code: (() => { const rows = document.querySelectorAll('[data-slot=\"split-table-row\"]'); const cells = document.querySelectorAll('[data-slot=\"split-table-cell\"]'); return JSON.stringify({rows: rows.length, cells: cells.length, firstCellHTML: cells[0]?.outerHTML.substring(0,200) || 'none', bodyText: document.body.innerText.substring(0,300)}); })()
